assumption_text: Observed choices Y_it are generated by a latent decision parameter theta_i and observed trial features X_it through p(Y_it | X_it, theta_i; eta).
source_or_rationale: Baseline notation from current proof route; refine in theorem draft.

assumption_text: The omitted contextual factor C_i affects theta_i through h(Z_i, C_i, U_i).
proof_or_analysis_dependency: Required to distinguish harmless noise from construct-relevant omission.

assumption_text: For the constructive theorem, theta_i = alpha_0 + alpha_1 Z_i + gamma C_i + u_i and C_i | Z_i=z has mean m(z) and variance v(z).
source_or_rationale: Needs PI/theorem review before being treated as the primary formal theorem.

assumption_text: The smoke-test DGM contains no true source/color/nonlinear ambiguity mechanism, so fitted source/color/nonlinear terms are false-complex absorbers by construction.
source_or_rationale: Encoded in R/dgm.R for fast proxy simulations.
proof_or_analysis_dependency: Interprets complex-model wins in scaffold simulations only.

assumption_text: RAID income/education analyses are model-sensitivity demonstrations unless a stronger identification strategy is approved.
source_or_rationale: Protects against overclaiming secondary observational data.
proof_or_analysis_dependency: Controls manuscript interpretation of empirical results.
